channel.title: Dad Joke of the Day — Best Dad Jokes
channel.description: A fresh dad joke delivered every day

image.title: Dad Joke of the Day — Best Dad Jokes

item.title: I told my wife she was drawing her eyebrows too high...
item.description: I told my wife she was drawing her eyebrows too high. She looked surprised.

item.title: Why don't scientists trust atoms?
item.description: Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything.

item.title: I'm reading a book about anti-gravity...
item.description: I'm reading a book about anti-gravity. It's impossible to put down.

item.title: What do you call a fake noodle?
item.description: What do you call a fake noodle? An impasta.

item.title: I used to hate facial hair...
item.description: I used to hate facial hair, but then it grew on me.

item.title: What did the ocean say to the beach?
item.description: What did the ocean say to the beach? Nothing, it just waved.

item.title: I'm afraid for the calendar...
item.description: I'm afraid for the calendar. Its days are numbered.
